zh.Dethick, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾德瑟其可
zh.lifeSummary: 當William De Dethick II於1348年出生在英國德比夏爾阿福時，他的父親Sir Geoffrey Dethick26歲，母親Emma Stafford22歲。他於1373年與Margery Frankville在英國英格蘭德比夏爾德瑟其可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世在英國英格蘭德比夏爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William De Dethick II于1348年出生在英国德比夏爾阿福时，他的父亲Sir Geoffrey Dethick26岁，母亲Emma Stafford22岁。他于1373年与Margery Frankville在英国英格兰德比夏爾德瑟其可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世在英国英格兰德比夏爾。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dethick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William De Dethick II was born in 1348, in Ashover, Derbyshire, England, his father, Sir Geoffrey Dethick, was 26 and his mother, Emma Stafford, was 22. He married Margery Frankville in 1373, in Dethick, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William De Dethick II est né en 1348, à Ashover, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Geoffrey Dethick, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Emma Stafford, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margery Frankville en 1373, à Dethick, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William De Dethick II 1348 in Ashover, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Geoffrey Dethick 26 und seine Mutter Emma Stafford 22. Er hat 1373 in Dethick, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Margery Frankville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William De Dethick II è nato il nel 1348 nel Ashover, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Geoffrey Dethick, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Emma Stafford, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Margery Frankville nel 1373, nel Dethick, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William De Dethick IIが1348年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアアショバーで生まれた時，父Sir Geoffrey Dethickは26歳，母Emma Staffordは22歳であった。1373年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアデスイックでMargery Frankvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William De Dethick II(이)가 1348년 영국 더비실르 애쇼버에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Geoffrey Dethick(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma Stafford(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1373년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 데스이c크에서 Margery Frankville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William De Dethick II nasceu em 1348, em Ashover, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Geoffrey Dethick, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Emma Stafford, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Frankville em 1373, em Dethick, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William De Dethick II родился в 1348 г. в местности ашовир, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Geoffrey Dethick было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma Stafford, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Frankville в 1373 г. в местности детикк, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William De Dethick II nació en 1348, en Ashover, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Geoffrey Dethick, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Emma Stafford, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Margery Frankville en 1373, en Dethick, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
